current_role: operator building toward a small business
business_direction: Use PackFactory and assistant systems to build toward a small business while staying grounded in larger personal goals and long-term direction.
long_horizon_goals: Develop a durable working partnership with the assistant that becomes more useful over time.
near_term_priorities: Translate high-level intention into clear next steps.
Refine the assistant into a reliable daily-driver business partner.
grounding_principles: Do not confuse motion with progress.
Reconnect tactical work to the larger business direction.
Surface ambiguity before committing to a path.
working_preferences: Prefer clear instructions over implied workflows.
Ask for refinement when a request is ambiguous.
ambiguity_preferences: Ask the minimum clarifying questions needed to proceed safely.
known_do_not_assume: the intended workflow when multiple PackFactory surfaces could apply
that a partially formed idea is ready for execution without refinement
that technical verification is the same as user experience validation
success_signals: The operator stays aligned with stated goals.
The assistant gets easier and more useful over repeated sessions.
Work moves toward a small-business direction rather than drifting.
